mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_orders (id, user_id, subject, content, level, status, create_time, last_reply) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{subject}, #{content}, #{level}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{lastReply})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM work_orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM work_orders ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_order_messages (order_id, role, content, time) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{time})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM work_order_messages WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE work_orders SET last_reply = #{lastReply} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE work_orders SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
